subject: auto-check prs for conflict every hour or so
instructions: e.g. there is a merge conflict here https://github.com/jess-bergs/agent-kanban/pull/18 -- handle scuh occurences automatically
lastOutput:
─────────────`

Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**Backend (server/dispatcher.ts)**:
- Extended `checkPrStatus()` to query `mergeable` from GitHub on every 3s poll and update `hasConflict`/`conflictDetectedAt` accordingly
- Added `checkPrConflicts()` function for dedicated conflict checking per ticket
- Added `conflictCheckTick()` that runs hourly to check all in-review PRs for conflicts
- Wired hourly interval into `startDispatcher()`/`stopDispatcher()` lifecycle

**API (server/index.ts)**:
- Added `POST /api/tickets/check-conflicts` endpoint to manually trigger conflict checks across all in-review PRs

**Types (src/types.ts)**:
- Added `hasConflict?: boolean` and `conflictDetectedAt?: number` to the `Ticket` interface

**UI (TicketCard.tsx & TicketDetailModal.tsx)**:
- Pulsing red **CONFLICT** badge on ticket cards
- PR link turns red when conflicted
- Dedicated conflict banner with detection timestamp in the detail modal

https://github.com/jess-bergs/agent-kanban/pull/21
